comments.html_body: Conversation with Web User 6a3b37d11b4040339372e3a7

comments.body:
L3 -

Merchant Requirement - Merchant wants to see the End Customer selected Service and Rate both in the Order Summary page in MCSL app

Current Available Option - Only the End Customer selected Service is shown but not the shipping rate

Why this Requirement - Here is the explanation from customer "because what we charge and what we pay is different because we account for packaging materials etc, it would be good to see what the actual amount the customer has paid to help us better select the best shipping option"

Additional Info - Customer was previously using Au Post where the End Customer selected Shipping Service and Rate both are shown during SLGP in Au Post app and customer is looking for same in the MCSL app

Could you please check for possibilities and let us know of the updates?

Store URL - patchwork-with-busyfingers.myshopify.com
App - Shopify MCSL
Account ID - f9532d91-c27c-47ef-a7e1-84d9fb703a3d

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/ehlCAaUVSdZKKxo9dYSHE9sw5/?name=image.png)
comments.html_body:
L3 - 
 
Merchant Requirement - Merchant wants to see the End Customer selected Service and Rate both in the Order Summary page in MCSL app
 
Current Available Option - Only the End Customer selected Service is shown but not the shipping rate
 
Why this Requirement - Here is the explanation from customer "because what we charge and what we pay is different because we account for packaging materials etc, it would be good to see what the actual amount the customer has paid to help us better select the best shipping option"
 
Additional Info - Customer was previously using Au Post where the End Customer selected Shipping Service and Rate both are shown during SLGP in Au Post app and customer is looking for same in the MCSL app
 
Could you please check for possibilities and let us know of the updates?
 
Store URL - patchwork-with-busyfingers.myshopify.com 
App - Shopify MCSL
Account ID - f9532d91-c27c-47ef-a7e1-84d9fb703a3d

comments.body:
(07:20:11) PluginHive: Hi there. How can I help you today?
(07:20:23) Web User 6a3b37d11b4040339372e3a7: Name: Shannon
Email: shannon@busyfingerspatchwork.com
(07:20:25) PluginHive: Connecting you with someone now.
(07:21:41) Shannon: I have an order that I'm trying to process however it appears that one of the products in the order didn't have a tariff code against it, so we went and added the code into the product, however we're still receiving error message for order #27048
Can someone please tell me how we fix this, and going forward how we know what the issue is, as the code doesn't necessarily tell you like you order app did that we used to use.
(07:22:24) Sagar K S: Thank you for sharing the details
 
Let me check and get back to you
(07:24:13) Shannon: also, with your other app, when you were entering the packing details such as weights and dimensions, the screen would show you what the customer had paid for shipping so we could compare against the quotes that show, however this new app doesn't show this, it only shows the shipping the customer selected, however because what we charge and what we pay is different because we account for packaging materials etc, it would be good to see what the actual amount the customer has paid to help us better select the best shipping option. I hope that makes sense. 
(07:32:12) Sagar K S: Regarding Order 27048, i have recorded a video and have shared it here. Please check and take necessiary action and try generating the label
 
Regarding your requirement about the customer selected service and rate, will have a check with our team and get back to you
(07:32:12) Sagar K S uploaded: Screen Recording 2026-06-24 at 7.26.24 AM.mov
URL: https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/sc/attachments/v2/01KVVNSP1ZHWJ45KRMS1ANZHN2/Screen%20Recording%202026-06-24%20at%207.26.24%E2%80%AFAM.mov
Type: video/quicktime
Size: 30194263
(07:38:18) Shannon: ok I will look at the video now and let you know shortly
(07:45:14) Shannon: that particular item, isn't an actual item, it is shipping insurance which customers can choose to add to their order as insurance, or not. Do these items still need a tariff code as they aren't as actual product. 
(07:50:17) Shannon: Physical product isn't selected within the item, I checked that already. So that isn't the problem. 
(07:51:13) Sagar K S: I could see that product is marked as Shipping Not Required in shopify. So, if you receive any order, ideally that product will not be considered for shipping, hence adding the custom details to that product might not be needed
(07:51:52) Shannon: so how do I fix this?
(07:52:52) Sagar K S: Are you still not able to generate label for the order 27048?
(07:53:10) Shannon: let me check, I haven't tried as I was trying to update the tariff as the video advised
(07:54:29) Shannon: its giving me a failure message under status and the error message is Schema Error. 
(07:55:48) Sagar K S: Let me check. Please dont take any further action to the order
(07:55:58) Shannon: ok
(08:19:45) Sagar K S: I could see for the order 27048, one quantity of the product "Wonderfil Spaghetti Thread Single Reels - new growth" was removed in shopify and the same has been updated for the order in the app.
 
Could you try generating the label for the order now? Please verify if the correct package is selected and then try to generate the label.
 
If not working, keep the order in the app as it is and we can check further.
(08:21:33) Shannon: ok, one moment.
(08:25:42) Shannon: that has worked this time. It did only show 1 of the postage options, instead of the regular 4-6 however we just went with what it was showing. 
(08:26:48) Sagar K S: Thanks for the confirmation of working
 
Regarding your requirement, will get back to you

comments.body:
Hello Shannon,

Good day!

We will be enhancing the app to display customer selected shipping rate along with the service in the order summary page in the upcoming releases.

Will keep you posted on the updates.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
